---
title: "<Project Title>"
author: "<Your Name>"
date: today
format: html
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
# library(terra)   # uncomment for raster work
# library(sf)      # uncomment for vector work

source("R/functions.R")  # your own functions live here
```

# Question

<!-- State the scientific question in plain language. What are you trying to find out? -->

# Data

<!-- Where does the data come from? What does one row / one pixel represent? -->

```{r load-data}
# raw <- read_csv("data/raw/your_data.csv")
```

# Approach

<!-- Before you write analysis code, write a sentence or two here describing your plan.
     This is also the prompt you give the assistant — and the thing you should be able to
     explain to a labmate. If you can't write the plan, you're not ready to ask the AI to
     write the code. -->

# Analysis

```{r}

```

# Findings

<!-- What did you learn? In your own words. -->

---

<!-- AI-use note (see handbook/04-documenting-ai-use.md):
     Briefly, how did the assistant help on this analysis? e.g.
     "AI helped debug a CRS mismatch and suggested the group_by/summarise structure;
      I wrote the plan and verified the output against the 2022 field counts." -->
